top3.sql:
SELECT 
    s_store_id,
    i_category,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_date BETWEEN '2000-08-23' AND '2000-09-22'
GROUP BY 
    s_store_id,
    i_category
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    s_store_id,

    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM

    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_date >= '2000-08-23' 
    AND d_date <= '2000-09-22'
GROUP BY 
    s_store_id,
    i_category
ORDER BY 
    total_sales DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    s_store_id,
    i_category,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_date BETWEEN '2000-08-23' AND '2000-09-22'
GROUP BY

    i_category

LIMIT 100;
